<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>SIAP - Reportes Operativos</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>
<style>
body{background-color:#0b0f19;color:#e2e8f0;font-family:"Segoe UI",Tahoma,Geneva,Verdana,sans-serif}
.siap-panel{background-color:#121824;border:1px solid #1e293b}
.siap-input{background-color:#1e2533;border:1px solid #334155;color:#f1f5f9}
.siap-input:focus{border-color:#3b82f6;outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(59,130,246,0.3)}
.scrollbar-custom::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px}
.scrollbar-custom::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#121824}
.scrollbar-custom::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#334155;border-radius:3px}
.scrollbar-custom::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:#475569}
</style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-between scrollbar-custom">
<div id="login-screen" class="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-blue-950 to-slate-950 p-4">
<div class="relative w-full max-w-md siap-panel rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-6 border-t-4 border-blue-500">
<div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
<div class="p-2 bg-blue-900/40 rounded-full"><i data-lucide="shield" class="w-6 h-6 text-blue-400"></i></div>
<h2 class="text-lg font-bold tracking-wide text-blue-100 uppercase">Acceso SIAP</h2>
</div>
<div class="flex justify-center mb-5">
<div class="w-44 h-44 rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-yellow-600/60 shadow-inner">
<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Escudo D.N.A.P.N" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
</div></div>
<form id="form-login" class="space-y-4">
<div>
  <label class="block text-slate-400 text-sm mb-1.5 font-medium">Grado:</label>
  <div class="relative">
    <select id="login-grado" required class="w-full siap-input p-3 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer">
      <option value="" disabled selected>Seleccione su grado...</option>
      <option>Agente</option>
      <option>Cabo</option>
      <option>Sargento</option>
      <option>Sub. Oficial Mayor</option>
      <option>Of. Ayudante</option>
      <option>Oficial Principal</option>
      <option>Sub. Comisario</option>
      <option>Comisario</option>
      <option>Comisario Mayor</option>
      <option>Comisario General</option>
    </select>
    <div class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none text-slate-400">
      <i data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<div>
  <label class="block text-slate-400 text-sm mb-1.5 font-medium">Nombre:</label>
  <input id="login-nombre" type="text" required placeholder="Nombre y apellido" class="w-full siap-input p-3 rounded-lg placeholder-slate-500">
</div>
<div id="login-error" class="hidden text-red-400 text-sm bg-red-950/40 p-2.5 rounded-lg border border-red-900">
  Por favor, complete todos los campos.
</div>
<div class="flex gap-4 pt-2">
  <button type="submit" class="flex-1 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-4 rounded-lg transition-all">Entrar</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.close()" class="flex-1 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 py-3 px-4 rounded-lg border border-slate-700">Cancelar</button>
</div>
</form>
</div></div>
<header class="border-b border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-40 px-4 py-3">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
  <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
    <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-yellow-600/40">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="D.N.A.P.N" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
    </div>
    <div>
      <h1 class="text-md font-bold tracking-wide text-slate-100 flex items-center gap-2">
        SIAP - Reportes de Aviacion <span class="text-xs bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded">D.N.A.P.N</span>
      </h1>
      <p class="text-xs text-slate-400">Direccion Nacional de Aviacion de la Policia Nacional</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="user-badge" class="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-800/80 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 text-sm">
    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></div>
    <span class="text-slate-300 font-medium">Cargando Operador...</span>
    <button onclick="cerrarSesion()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 ml-2 p-1 hover:bg-slate-700 rounded">
      <i data-lucide="log-out" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
</header>
<main class="flex-1 max-w-7xl w-full mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6">
<section class="lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-5">
  <div class="siap-panel p-5 rounded-xl shadow-xl space-y-4">
    <div class="flex items-center border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
      <h2 class="text-sm font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
        <i data-lucide="file-text" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Datos Generales
      </h2>
    </div>
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Fecha</label>
        <input id="field-fecha" type="date" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Hora</label>
        <div class="flex gap-2">
          <input id="field-hora" type="time" class="flex-1 siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
          <button onclick="establecerHoraActual()" class="bg-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-600 text-slate-200 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-semibold rounded uppercase">Ahora</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sm:col-span-2">
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Numero de Registro</label>
        <input id="field-nro-registro" type="text" placeholder="Ingrese numero de registro manualmente" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm font-mono">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Departamento</label>
        <select id="field-departamento" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
          <option value="-">-</option>
          <option>Artigas</option>
          <option>Canelones</option>
          <option>Cerro Largo</option>
          <option>Colonia</option>
          <option>Durazno</option>
          <option>Flores</option>
          <option>Florida</option>
          <option>Lavalleja</option>
          <option>Maldonado</option>
          <option>Montevideo</option>
          <option>Paysandu</option>
          <option>Rio Negro</option>
          <option>Rivera</option>
          <option>Rocha</option>
          <option>Salto</option>
          <option>San Jose</option>
          <option>Soriano</option>
          <option>Tacuarembo</option>
          <option>Treinta y Tres</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="sm:col-span-2">
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Direccion</label>
        <input id="field-direccion" type="text" placeholder="Direccion del hecho" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Seccional</label>
        <select id="field-seccional" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
          <option value="-">-</option>
          <option>Secc. 1</option>
          <option>Secc. 2</option>
          <option>Secc. 3</option>
          <option>Secc. 4</option>
          <option>Secc. 5</option>
          <option>Secc. 6</option>
          <option>Secc. 7</option>
          <option>Secc. 8</option>
          <option>Secc. 9</option>
          <option>Secc. 10</option>
          <option>Secc. 11</option>
          <option>Secc. 12</option>
          <option>Secc. 13</option>
          <option>Secc. 14</option>
          <option>Secc. 15</option>
          <option>Secc. 16</option>
          <option>Secc. 17</option>
          <option>Secc. 18</option>
          <option>Secc. 19</option>
          <option>Secc. 20</option>
          <option>Secc. 21</option>
          <option>Secc. 22</option>
          <option>Secc. 23</option>
          <option>Secc. 24</option>
          <option>Secc. 25</option>
          <option>Secc. 26</option>
          <option>Secc. 27</option>
          <option>Secc. 28</option>
          <option>Secc. 29</option>
          <option>Secc. 30</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Zona</label>
        <select id="field-zona" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
          <option value="-">-</option>
          <option>Zona 1</option>
          <option>Zona 2</option>
          <option>Zona 3</option>
          <option>Zona 4</option>
          <option>Zona 5</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="sm:col-span-2">
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Hecho</label>
        <input id="field-hecho" type="text" list="hechos-comunes" placeholder="Escribe o selecciona el hecho..." class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
        <datalist id="hechos-comunes">
          <option value="Patrullaje preventivo aereo">
          <option value="Apoyo aereo a unidades de tierra">
          <option value="Busqueda y rescate (SAR)">
          <option value="Traslado sanitario urgente">
          <option value="Inspeccion ocular de fronteras">
          <option value="Accidente vial de gravedad">
          <option value="No corresponde">
        </datalist>
      </div>
      <div class="sm:col-span-2">
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Complemento</label>
        <input id="field-complemento" type="text" list="complementos-comunes" placeholder="Escribe o selecciona complemento..." class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
        <datalist id="complementos-comunes">
          <option value="Sin novedad de relevancia">
          <option value="Apoyo a helicoptero Robinson R44">
          <option value="Coordinacion con base Carrasco">
          <option value="Operativo saturacion">
          <option value="Prueba de sistemas internos">
          <option value="(No corresponde)">
        </datalist>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Operativo</label>
        <input id="field-operativo" type="text" placeholder="Ej. Gavilan II" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">SIVVE</label>
        <input id="field-sivve" type="text" placeholder="Codigo SIVVE" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">SGSP</label>
        <input id="field-sgsp" type="text" placeholder="No Evento SGSP" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Unidad Solicitante</label>
        <select id="field-solicitante" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
          <option>J.P.M</option><option>D.N.A.P.N</option><option>C.C.U</option>
          <option>D.N.P.C</option><option value="Fiscalia Penal">Fiscalia Penal</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="siap-panel p-5 rounded-xl shadow-xl flex flex-col min-h-[300px]">
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-800 pb-3 mb-3">
      <label class="text-sm font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
        <i data-lucide="align-left" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Narracion del Hecho
      </label>
      <span id="char-counter" class="text-xs font-mono text-slate-500 bg-slate-900/60 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">0 / 2500 caracteres</span>
    </div>
    <textarea id="field-narracion" maxlength="2500" placeholder="Escriba aqui los detalles operativos..." class="flex-1 w-full siap-input p-3 rounded-lg text-sm resize-none scrollbar-custom min-h-[200px]" oninput="actualizarContadorNarracion()"></textarea>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col gap-5">
  <!-- PANEL AERONAVE Y TRIPULACION -->
  <div class="siap-panel p-5 rounded-xl shadow-xl space-y-4">
    <div class="flex items-center border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
      <h2 class="text-sm font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
        <i data-lucide="plane" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Aeronave y Tripulacion
      </h2>
    </div>
    <!-- Aeronave -->
    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Tipo de Aeronave</label>
        <select id="field-tipo-aeronave" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
          <option value="-">-</option>
          <option value="Avion">Avion</option>
          <option value="Helicoptero">Helicoptero</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Matricula</label>
        <input id="field-matricula" type="text" placeholder="Ej: CX-PHN" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm font-mono uppercase">
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Tripulacion -->
    <div class="space-y-3 pt-1">
      <p class="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Tripulacion</p>
      <!-- Piloto -->
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Piloto</label>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          <select id="field-piloto-grado" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs cursor-pointer">
              <option value="">- Grado -</option>
              <option>Agente</option>
              <option>Cabo</option>
              <option>Sargento</option>
              <option>Sub. Oficial Mayor</option>
              <option>Of. Ayudante</option>
              <option>Oficial Principal</option>
              <option>Sub. Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario Mayor</option>
              <option>Comisario General</option>
          </select>
          <input id="field-piloto-nombre" type="text" placeholder="Nombre y apellido" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs">
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Observador 1 -->
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Observador 1</label>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          <select id="field-obs1-grado" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs cursor-pointer">
              <option value="">- Grado -</option>
              <option>Agente</option>
              <option>Cabo</option>
              <option>Sargento</option>
              <option>Sub. Oficial Mayor</option>
              <option>Of. Ayudante</option>
              <option>Oficial Principal</option>
              <option>Sub. Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario Mayor</option>
              <option>Comisario General</option>
          </select>
          <input id="field-obs1-nombre" type="text" placeholder="Nombre y apellido" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs">
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Observador 2 (opcional) -->
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1 flex items-center gap-2">
          Observador 2 <span class="text-slate-600 font-normal normal-case">(opcional)</span>
        </label>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          <select id="field-obs2-grado" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs cursor-pointer">
              <option value="">- Grado -</option>
              <option>Agente</option>
              <option>Cabo</option>
              <option>Sargento</option>
              <option>Sub. Oficial Mayor</option>
              <option>Of. Ayudante</option>
              <option>Oficial Principal</option>
              <option>Sub. Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario</option>
              <option>Comisario Mayor</option>
              <option>Comisario General</option>
          </select>
          <input id="field-obs2-nombre" type="text" placeholder="Nombre y apellido" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="siap-panel p-5 rounded-xl shadow-xl space-y-4">
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-800 pb-3">
      <h2 class="text-sm font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2">
        <i data-lucide="camera" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Evidencias Fotograficas
      </h2>
      <span id="photo-counter" class="text-xs bg-slate-800 text-blue-400 border border-slate-700 font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded-full">0 / 15 Fotos</span>
    </div>
    <div id="photos-container" class="space-y-4 max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto scrollbar-custom pr-1"></div>
    <button onclick="agregarNuevaFoto()" class="w-full py-3 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 border border-dashed border-slate-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 font-semibold text-sm hover:border-slate-400">
      <i data-lucide="plus-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400"></i> Agregar Imagen
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="siap-panel p-5 rounded-xl shadow-xl space-y-4">
    <h2 class="text-sm font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-400 uppercase border-b border-slate-800 pb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
      <i data-lucide="shield-alert" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Parametros de Seguridad
    </h2>
    <div class="space-y-3">
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Marca de agua para el PDF:</label>
        <div class="flex gap-2">
          <select id="watermark-pdf-select" onchange="togglePersonalizadoPdf()" class="flex-1 siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
            <option value="NINGUNA">Ninguna</option>
            <option value="D.N.A.P.N" selected>D.N.A.P.N (Oficial)</option>
            <option value="BORRADOR">Borrador</option>
            <option value="CONFIDENCIAL">Confidencial</option>
            <option value="PERSONALIZADA">Personalizada...</option>
          </select>
          <input id="watermark-pdf-custom" type="text" placeholder="Escriba texto..." class="hidden flex-1 siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Sello para imagenes individuales:</label>
        <div class="flex gap-2">
          <select id="watermark-img-select" onchange="togglePersonalizadoImg()" class="flex-1 siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm cursor-pointer">
            <option value="NINGUNA">Ninguna</option>
            <option value="POLICIA NACIONAL" selected>Policia Nacional</option>
            <option value="D.N.A.P.N">D.N.A.P.N</option>
            <option value="EVIDENCIA">Evidencia Oficial</option>
            <option value="PERSONALIZADA">Personalizada...</option>
          </select>
          <input id="watermark-img-custom" type="text" placeholder="Sello foto..." class="hidden flex-1 siap-input p-2 rounded text-sm">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</main>
<footer class="border-t border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/90 backdrop-blur-md py-4 px-6 sticky bottom-0 z-40">
<div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-wrap justify-between items-center gap-4">
  <div class="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
    <button onclick="generarReportePDF()" class="bg-gradient-to-r from-red-600 to-rose-700 hover:from-red-500 hover:to-rose-600 text-white font-bold py-2.5 px-6 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
      <i data-lucide="file-down" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Generar PDF
    </button>
    <button onclick="guardarReporteEnHistorial()" class="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-semibold py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
      <i data-lucide="save" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Guardar Reporte
    </button>
    <button onclick="confirmarRestaurarCampos()" class="bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 border border-slate-700 text-sm">
      <i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" class="w-4 h-4"></i> Restaurar campos
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
    <button onclick="abrirHistorial()" class="bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 border border-slate-700 text-sm">
      <i data-lucide="history" class="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400"></i> Ver historial
    </button>
    <button onclick="abrirModalAcercaDe()" class="bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 p-2.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-700">
      <i data-lucide="info" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
</footer>

<div id="modal-historial" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 z-50 hidden flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<div class="w-full max-w-4xl siap-panel rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-6 border border-slate-700 flex flex-col max-h-[85vh]">
  <div class="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-slate-800 pb-4 mb-4">
    <h3 class="text-md font-bold text-slate-100 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2">
      <i data-lucide="archive" class="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400"></i> Repositorio de Informes Guardados
    </h3>
    <button onclick="cerrarHistorial()" class="text-slate-400 hover:text-white bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 p-2 rounded-lg">
      <i data-lucide="x" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="relative mb-4">
    <input id="search-report-input" type="text" placeholder="Filtrar por Direccion, Hecho u Operador..." class="w-full siap-input p-3 pl-10 rounded-xl text-sm" oninput="filtrarReportesEnHistorial()">
    <div class="absolute left-3.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400"><i data-lucide="search" class="w-4 h-4"></i></div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-custom border border-slate-800 rounded-xl bg-slate-950/40 p-2">
    <table class="w-full text-left border-collapse">
      <thead>
        <tr class="border-b border-slate-800 text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase">
          <th class="p-3">Fecha / Hora</th>
          <th class="p-3">Hecho / Operativo</th>
          <th class="p-3">Oficial</th>
          <th class="p-3 text-right">Acciones</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="historial-table-body" class="divide-y divide-slate-900 text-sm text-slate-300"></tbody>
    </table>
    <div id="historial-vacio" class="hidden text-center py-12 text-slate-500">
      <i data-lucide="folder-open" class="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-3 opacity-30"></i>
      <p>No se encontraron reportes archivados.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pt-4 border-t border-slate-800 flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-slate-500">
    <span>Datos guardados localmente en este navegador.</span>
    <button onclick="exportarBaseDeDatosCompleta()" class="text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 font-semibold flex items-center gap-1">
      <i data-lucide="download" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i> Respaldar JSON
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div id="modal-acerca" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/75 z-50 hidden flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<div class="w-full max-w-md siap-panel rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-6 text-center space-y-4">
  <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden mx-auto border-2 border-yellow-600/50">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="D.N.A.P.N" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
  </div>
  <h3 class="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100">SIAP - Reportes Operativos v4.0</h3>
  <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 leading-relaxed">Sistema integrado de redaccion y exportacion de informes para la D.N.A.P.N.</p>
  <div class="text-left text-xs bg-slate-950 p-3 rounded-lg border border-slate-800 space-y-1 font-mono text-slate-400">
    <p>Soporte de imagenes: Hasta 15 adjuntos.</p>
    <p>Limite narracion: 2500 caracteres.</p>
    <p>Limite pie de foto: 150 caracteres.</p>
    <p>Respaldo local: Activo.</p>
  </div>
  <button onclick="cerrarModalAcercaDe()" class="w-full py-2 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg font-semibold text-sm">Entendido</button>
</div>
</div>

<div id="modal-alert" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-4">
<div class="w-full max-w-sm siap-panel rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-5 text-center space-y-4">
  <div id="alert-icon-container" class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-blue-400 bg-blue-900/20">
    <i id="alert-icon" data-lucide="info" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
  </div>
  <h4 id="alert-title" class="text-md font-bold text-slate-100">Mensaje</h4>
  <p id="alert-message" class="text-xs text-slate-300 leading-relaxed"></p>
  <button onclick="cerrarAlert()" class="w-full py-2 bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-100 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Aceptar</button>
</div>
</div>


<script>
var ESCUDO_B64 = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

var operadorActivo = null;
var fotosArray = [];
var MAX_FOTOS = 15;
var MAX_CHAR_FOTO = 150;

window.onload = function() {
  lucide.createIcons();
  var sesion = localStorage.getItem("siap_operador");
  if (sesion) { operadorActivo = JSON.parse(sesion); aplicarSesion(); }
  inicializarFechaYHora();
  agregarNuevaFoto();
  document.getElementById("form-login").addEventListener("submit", procesarLogin);
};

function procesarLogin(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  var grado = document.getElementById("login-grado").value;
  var nombre = document.getElementById("login-nombre").value.trim();
  if (!grado || !nombre) { document.getElementById("login-error").classList.remove("hidden"); return; }
  document.getElementById("login-error").classList.add("hidden");
  operadorActivo = { grado: grado, nombre: nombre };
  localStorage.setItem("siap_operador", JSON.stringify(operadorActivo));
  aplicarSesion();
  var ls = document.getElementById("login-screen");
  ls.style.transition = "opacity 0.4s ease";
  ls.style.opacity = "0";
  setTimeout(function(){ ls.classList.add("hidden"); }, 400);
  mostrarAlerta("success", "Sesion Iniciada", "Bienvenido " + grado + " " + nombre + ".");
}

function aplicarSesion() {
  if (!operadorActivo) return;
  document.getElementById("user-badge").innerHTML =
    '<div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></div>' +
    '<span class="text-slate-300 font-medium">' + operadorActivo.grado + ' - ' + operadorActivo.nombre + '</span>' +
    '<button onclick="cerrarSesion()" class="text-slate-400 hover:text-red-400 ml-2 p-1 hover:bg-slate-700 rounded"><i data-lucide="log-out" class="w-4 h-4"></i></button>';
  lucide.createIcons();
  document.getElementById("login-screen").classList.add("hidden");
}

function cerrarSesion() {
  operadorActivo = null;
  localStorage.removeItem("siap_operador");
  document.getElementById("login-nombre").value = "";
  document.getElementById("login-grado").selectedIndex = 0;
  var ls = document.getElementById("login-screen");
  ls.classList.remove("hidden");
  ls.style.opacity = "1";
}

function inicializarFechaYHora() {
  var hoy = new Date();
  var d = String(hoy.getDate()).padStart(2,"0");
  var m = String(hoy.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");
  document.getElementById("field-fecha").value = hoy.getFullYear()+"-"+m+"-"+d;
  establecerHoraActual();
}

function establecerHoraActual() {
  var hoy = new Date();
  document.getElementById("field-hora").value =
    String(hoy.getHours()).padStart(2,"0")+":"+String(hoy.getMinutes()).padStart(2,"0");
}

function agregarNuevaFoto() {
  if (fotosArray.length >= MAX_FOTOS) { mostrarAlerta("alert","Limite","Maximo "+MAX_FOTOS+" fotos por reporte."); return; }
  fotosArray.push({ id: "f_"+Date.now()+"_"+Math.floor(Math.random()*1000), base64: null, pie: "", orientacion: "Horizontal" });
  renderFotos();
}

function renderFotos() {
  var c = document.getElementById("photos-container");
  c.innerHTML = "";
  fotosArray.forEach(function(foto, idx) {
    var div = document.createElement("div");
    div.className = "p-4 bg-slate-900/60 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl space-y-3 relative";
    var imgHtml = foto.base64
      ? '<div class="relative group rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 w-full aspect-video flex items-center justify-center">' +
        '<img src="'+foto.base64+'" class="object-contain max-h-24 w-full h-full">' +
        '<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 flex items-center justify-center">' +
        '<label class="cursor-pointer text-xs bg-blue-600 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white font-semibold">Cambiar<input type="file" accept="image/*" class="hidden" onchange="cargarImagen(event,\''+foto.id+'\')"></label>' +
        '</div></div>'
      : '<label class="w-full aspect-video border border-dashed border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-500 bg-slate-950 rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 cursor-pointer p-4 text-center">' +
        '<i data-lucide="image" class="w-6 h-6 text-slate-500"></i>' +
        '<span class="text-xs text-slate-400">Examinar archivo</span>' +
        '<input type="file" accept="image/*" class="hidden" onchange="cargarImagen(event,\''+foto.id+'\')">' +
        '</label>';
    div.innerHTML =
      '<button onclick="eliminarFoto(\''+foto.id+'\')" class="absolute top-3 right-3 text-red-400 hover:text-white bg-slate-800 hover:bg-red-600 w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg"><i data-lucide="trash-2" class="w-4 h-4"></i></button>' +
      '<span class="text-xs font-mono font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase block">Foto Slot #'+(idx+1)+'</span>' +
      '<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-12 gap-3 items-center">' +
        '<div class="sm:col-span-4">'+imgHtml+'</div>' +
        '<div class="sm:col-span-8 space-y-2">' +
          '<div>' +
            '<div class="flex justify-between mb-1"><label class="text-xs text-slate-400">Pie de imagen:</label>' +
            '<span class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">'+foto.pie.length+' / '+MAX_CHAR_FOTO+' c.</span></div>' +
            '<input type="text" maxlength="'+MAX_CHAR_FOTO+'" placeholder="Describa la foto..." value="'+foto.pie.replace(/"/g,"&quot;")+'" oninput="actualizarPie(\''+foto.id+'\',this.value)" class="w-full siap-input p-2 rounded text-xs">' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div><label class="block text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1">Orientacion:</label>' +
          '<select onchange="actualizarOrientacion(\''+foto.id+'\',this.value)" class="w-full siap-input p-1.5 rounded text-xs cursor-pointer">' +
          '<option value="Horizontal"'+(foto.orientacion==="Horizontal"?" selected":"")+'>Horizontal</option>' +
          '<option value="Vertical"'+(foto.orientacion==="Vertical"?" selected":"")+'>Vertical</option>' +
          '</select></div>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    c.appendChild(div);
  });
  document.getElementById("photo-counter").innerText = fotosArray.length+" / "+MAX_FOTOS+" Fotos";
  lucide.createIcons();
}

function cargarImagen(event, id) {
  var f = event.target.files[0];
  if (!f) return;
  var r = new FileReader();
  r.onload = function(e) {
    var i = fotosArray.findIndex(function(x){ return x.id===id; });
    if (i!==-1) { fotosArray[i].base64 = e.target.result; renderFotos(); }
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(f);
}

function actualizarPie(id, val) {
  var i = fotosArray.findIndex(function(x){ return x.id===id; });
  if (i!==-1) fotosArray[i].pie = val;
}

function actualizarOrientacion(id, val) {
  var i = fotosArray.findIndex(function(x){ return x.id===id; });
  if (i!==-1) fotosArray[i].orientacion = val;
}

function eliminarFoto(id) {
  if (fotosArray.length <= 1) { fotosArray=[]; agregarNuevaFoto(); return; }
  fotosArray = fotosArray.filter(function(x){ return x.id!==id; });
  renderFotos();
}

function actualizarContadorNarracion() {
  var t = document.getElementById("field-narracion").value;
  var c = document.getElementById("char-counter");
  c.innerText = t.length+" / 2500 caracteres";
  c.className = t.length>=2400
    ? "text-xs font-mono text-amber-400 bg-amber-950/40 px-2 py-0.5 rounded"
    : "text-xs font-mono text-slate-500 bg-slate-900/60 px-2 py-0.5 rounded";
}

function togglePersonalizadoPdf() {
  var v = document.getElementById("watermark-pdf-select").value;
  document.getElementById("watermark-pdf-custom").classList.toggle("hidden", v!=="PERSONALIZADA");
}
function togglePersonalizadoImg() {
  var v = document.getElementById("watermark-img-select").value;
  document.getElementById("watermark-img-custom").classList.toggle("hidden", v!=="PERSONALIZADA");
}

function obtenerDatos() {
  var fecha = document.getElementById("field-fecha").value;
  var hora = document.getElementById("field-hora").value;
  var ts = Date.now().toString().slice(-3);
  var id = "ID-"+fecha.replace(/-/g,"")+hora.replace(/:/g,"")+"-"+ts;
  return {
    id: id, fecha: fecha, hora: hora,
    nroRegistro: document.getElementById("field-nro-registro").value.trim(),
    departamento: document.getElementById("field-departamento").value,
    direccion: document.getElementById("field-direccion").value.trim(),
    seccional: document.getElementById("field-seccional").value,
    zona: document.getElementById("field-zona").value,
    hecho: document.getElementById("field-hecho").value.trim(),
    complemento: document.getElementById("field-complemento").value.trim(),
    operativo: document.getElementById("field-operativo").value.trim(),
    sivve: document.getElementById("field-sivve").value.trim(),
    sgsp: document.getElementById("field-sgsp").value.trim(),
    solicitante: document.getElementById("field-solicitante").value,
    tipoAeronave: document.getElementById("field-tipo-aeronave").value,
    matricula: document.getElementById("field-matricula").value.trim(),
    pilotoGrado: document.getElementById("field-piloto-grado").value,
    pilotoNombre: document.getElementById("field-piloto-nombre").value.trim(),
    obs1Grado: document.getElementById("field-obs1-grado").value,
    obs1Nombre: document.getElementById("field-obs1-nombre").value.trim(),
    obs2Grado: document.getElementById("field-obs2-grado").value,
    obs2Nombre: document.getElementById("field-obs2-nombre").value.trim(),
    narracion: document.getElementById("field-narracion").value.trim(),
    operador: operadorActivo || { grado:"Operador", nombre:"No Registrado" },
    fotos: fotosArray.filter(function(f){ return f.base64!==null; }),
    creadoEn: Date.now()
  };
}

function guardarReporteEnHistorial() {
  var d = obtenerDatos();
  if (!d.narracion) { mostrarAlerta("alert","Datos Incompletos","Escriba la narracion antes de guardar."); return; }
  var repo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  repo.push(d);
  localStorage.setItem("siap_repositorio_reportes", JSON.stringify(repo));
  mostrarAlerta("success","Guardado","Reporte guardado con ID: "+d.id);
}

function abrirHistorial() {
  document.getElementById("modal-historial").classList.remove("hidden");
  renderHistorial();
}
function cerrarHistorial() { document.getElementById("modal-historial").classList.add("hidden"); }

function renderHistorial(lista) {
  var repo = lista || JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  var tbody = document.getElementById("historial-table-body");
  var vacio = document.getElementById("historial-vacio");
  tbody.innerHTML = "";
  if (!repo.length) { vacio.classList.remove("hidden"); return; }
  vacio.classList.add("hidden");
  repo.slice().sort(function(a,b){ return b.creadoEn-a.creadoEn; }).forEach(function(rep) {
    var tr = document.createElement("tr");
    tr.className = "hover:bg-slate-900 border-b border-slate-900/60";
    var fp = rep.fecha.split("-");
    var fa = fp.length===3 ? fp[2]+"/"+fp[1]+"/"+fp[0] : rep.fecha;
    tr.innerHTML =
      '<td class="p-3"><span class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-100">'+fa+'</span><span class="block text-[10px] text-slate-400">'+rep.hora+' hs</span></td>'+
      '<td class="p-3"><span class="block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-200">'+(rep.hecho||"Sin Hecho")+'</span><span class="block text-[10px] text-slate-500">'+(rep.operativo?"Op: "+rep.operativo:"Sin Operativo")+'</span></td>'+
      '<td class="p-3 text-xs text-slate-400">'+(rep.operador?rep.operador.grado+" "+rep.operador.nombre:"Desconocido")+'</td>'+
      '<td class="p-3 text-right"><div class="flex justify-end gap-2">'+
        '<button onclick="cargarEnFormulario(\''+rep.id+'\')" class="bg-blue-600/20 hover:bg-blue-600 text-blue-400 hover:text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-[11px] font-bold flex items-center gap-1"><i data-lucide="edit-3" class="w-3 h-3"></i> Editar</button>'+
        '<button onclick="descargarPDFid(\''+rep.id+'\')" class="bg-red-600/20 hover:bg-red-600 text-red-400 hover:text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-[11px] font-bold flex items-center gap-1"><i data-lucide="file-text" class="w-3 h-3"></i> PDF</button>'+
        '<button onclick="eliminarDeHistorial(\''+rep.id+'\')" class="bg-slate-800 hover:bg-red-950 text-slate-500 hover:text-red-400 p-1.5 rounded"><i data-lucide="trash-2" class="w-3.5 h-3.5"></i></button>'+
      '</div></td>';
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  });
  lucide.createIcons();
}

function filtrarReportesEnHistorial() {
  var q = document.getElementById("search-report-input").value.toLowerCase();
  var repo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  if (!q) { renderHistorial(repo); return; }
  renderHistorial(repo.filter(function(r){
    return (r.direccion||"").toLowerCase().includes(q)||
           (r.hecho||"").toLowerCase().includes(q)||
           (r.operativo||"").toLowerCase().includes(q)||
           (r.operador&&((r.operador.nombre||"").toLowerCase().includes(q)||(r.operador.grado||"").toLowerCase().includes(q)));
  }));
}

function cargarEnFormulario(id) {
  var repo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  var rep = repo.find(function(r){ return r.id===id; });
  if (!rep) return;
  document.getElementById("field-fecha").value = rep.fecha;
  document.getElementById("field-hora").value = rep.hora;
  document.getElementById("field-nro-registro").value = rep.nroRegistro||"";
  document.getElementById("field-departamento").value = rep.departamento||"-";
  document.getElementById("field-direccion").value = rep.direccion;
  document.getElementById("field-seccional").value = rep.seccional;
  document.getElementById("field-zona").value = rep.zona;
  document.getElementById("field-hecho").value = rep.hecho;
  document.getElementById("field-complemento").value = rep.complemento;
  document.getElementById("field-operativo").value = rep.operativo;
  document.getElementById("field-sivve").value = rep.sivve;
  document.getElementById("field-sgsp").value = rep.sgsp;
  document.getElementById("field-solicitante").value = rep.solicitante;
  document.getElementById("field-tipo-aeronave").value = rep.tipoAeronave||"-";
  document.getElementById("field-matricula").value = rep.matricula||"";
  document.getElementById("field-piloto-grado").value = rep.pilotoGrado||"";
  document.getElementById("field-piloto-nombre").value = rep.pilotoNombre||"";
  document.getElementById("field-obs1-grado").value = rep.obs1Grado||"";
  document.getElementById("field-obs1-nombre").value = rep.obs1Nombre||"";
  document.getElementById("field-obs2-grado").value = rep.obs2Grado||"";
  document.getElementById("field-obs2-nombre").value = rep.obs2Nombre||"";
  document.getElementById("field-narracion").value = rep.narracion;
  fotosArray = rep.fotos && rep.fotos.length ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(rep.fotos)) : [];
  if (!fotosArray.length) agregarNuevaFoto();
  actualizarContadorNarracion();
  renderFotos();
  cerrarHistorial();
  mostrarAlerta("success","Cargado","Reporte restaurado para edicion.");
}

function descargarPDFid(id) {
  var repo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  var rep = repo.find(function(r){ return r.id===id; });
  if (rep) generarPDFPro(rep);
}

function eliminarDeHistorial(id) {
  var repo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]");
  localStorage.setItem("siap_repositorio_reportes", JSON.stringify(repo.filter(function(r){ return r.id!==id; })));
  filtrarReportesEnHistorial();
}

function exportarBaseDeDatosCompleta() {
  var blob = new Blob([localStorage.getItem("siap_repositorio_reportes")||"[]"],{type:"application/json"});
  var a = document.createElement("a");
  a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.download = "RESPALDO_SIAP_"+Date.now()+".json";
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
}

function confirmarRestaurarCampos() {
  ["field-nro-registro","field-direccion","field-hecho","field-complemento","field-operativo","field-sivve","field-sgsp","field-narracion"].forEach(function(id){
    document.getElementById(id).value="";
  });
  document.getElementById("field-tipo-aeronave").value="-";
  document.getElementById("field-matricula").value="";
  document.getElementById("field-piloto-grado").selectedIndex=0;
  document.getElementById("field-piloto-nombre").value="";
  document.getElementById("field-obs1-grado").selectedIndex=0;
  document.getElementById("field-obs1-nombre").value="";
  document.getElementById("field-obs2-grado").selectedIndex=0;
  document.getElementById("field-obs2-nombre").value="";
  document.getElementById("field-departamento").value="-";
  document.getElementById("field-seccional").value="-";
  document.getElementById("field-zona").value="-";
  document.getElementById("field-solicitante").value="J.P.M";
  fotosArray=[]; agregarNuevaFoto();
  actualizarContadorNarracion();
  inicializarFechaYHora();
  mostrarAlerta("info","Restaurado","Formulario limpiado correctamente.");
}

function generarReportePDF() {
  var d = obtenerDatos();
  if (!d.narracion) { mostrarAlerta("alert","Falta Narracion","Escriba la narracion antes de generar el PDF."); return; }
  generarPDFPro(d);
}

function generarPDFPro(datos) {
  var doc = new window.jspdf.jsPDF({ orientation:"p", unit:"mm", format:"a4" });

  var wmPdf = document.getElementById("watermark-pdf-select").value;
  if (wmPdf==="PERSONALIZADA") wmPdf = document.getElementById("watermark-pdf-custom").value.trim()||"D.N.A.P.N";
  var wmImg = document.getElementById("watermark-img-select").value;
  if (wmImg==="PERSONALIZADA") wmImg = document.getElementById("watermark-img-custom").value.trim()||"EVIDENCIA";

  function marcaAgua(d) {
    if (wmPdf==="NINGUNA") return;
    d.setFont("helvetica","bold"); d.setFontSize(45); d.setTextColor(220,225,230);
    d.text(wmPdf,105,148,{align:"center",angle:45});
  }

  function encabezado(d, pag) {
    d.setFillColor(28,40,65); d.rect(0,0,210,4,"F");
    d.setFillColor(184,134,11); d.rect(0,4,210,1.5,"F");
    // Escudo oficial
    try { d.addImage(ESCUDO_B64,"JPEG",14,8,23,23); } catch(e){}
    d.setDrawColor(184,134,11); d.setLineWidth(0.5); d.circle(25.5,19.5,12,"D");
    d.setTextColor(20,30,50); d.setFont("helvetica","bold"); d.setFontSize(10);
    d.text("MINISTERIO DEL INTERIOR",40,13);
    d.setFontSize(8.5); d.setFont("helvetica","normal");
    d.text("DIRECCION NACIONAL DE AVIACION DE LA POLICIA NACIONAL",40,17.5);
    d.setFontSize(7.5); d.setTextColor(100,110,120);
    d.text("Aeropuerto Internacional de Carrasco - Tel: 20304443",40,21.5);
    d.text("Email: dnapn-operpoliciales@minterior.gub.uy",40,25);
    d.setFillColor(241,245,249); d.rect(14,34,182,7.5,"F");
    d.setDrawColor(203,213,225); d.setLineWidth(0.2); d.rect(14,34,182,7.5,"D");
    d.setTextColor(15,23,42); d.setFont("helvetica","bold"); d.setFontSize(9);
    d.text("INFORME OPERATIVO",105,39,{align:"center"});
    d.setDrawColor(226,232,240); d.setLineWidth(0.3); d.line(14,283,196,283);
    d.setFont("helvetica","normal"); d.setFontSize(7); d.setTextColor(148,163,184);
    d.text("SIAP - D.N.A.P.N - Policia Nacional",14,287);
    d.text("Pagina "+pag,196,287,{align:"right"});
  }

  // PAG 1
  marcaAgua(doc); encabezado(doc,1);
  // Bloque realizador + tripulacion
  // Calcular altura: 1 fila header + 1 realizador + 1 aeronave + tripulantes
  var tripLineas = [];
  tripLineas.push({rol:"Piloto:", val: datos.pilotoGrado&&datos.pilotoNombre ? datos.pilotoGrado+" "+datos.pilotoNombre : "No registrado"});
  tripLineas.push({rol:"Observador 1:", val: datos.obs1Grado&&datos.obs1Nombre ? datos.obs1Grado+" "+datos.obs1Nombre : "No registrado"});
  if (datos.obs2Nombre) tripLineas.push({rol:"Observador 2:", val: datos.obs2Grado+" "+datos.obs2Nombre});

  var altoBloque = 8 + (tripLineas.length * 6) + 6; // header + filas + padding

  // Fondo header azul marino
  doc.setFillColor(28,40,65); doc.rect(14,43,182,7,"F");
  doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(184,134,11);
  doc.text("REALIZA EL INFORME:",16,47.5);
  doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);
  doc.text((datos.operador.grado+" - "+datos.operador.nombre).toUpperCase(),62,47.5);

  // Fondo cuerpo gris claro para tripulacion
  doc.setFillColor(241,245,249); doc.rect(14,50,182,altoBloque-7,"F");
  doc.setDrawColor(203,213,225); doc.setLineWidth(0.2); doc.rect(14,50,182,altoBloque-7,"D");

  // Aeronave y matricula
  var aeroVal = (datos.tipoAeronave&&datos.tipoAeronave!=="-"?datos.tipoAeronave:"N/A")+" | Mat: "+(datos.matricula||"N/A");
  doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(7.5); doc.setTextColor(71,85,105);
  doc.text("Aeronave:", 16, 55);
  doc.setFont("helvetica","normal"); doc.setTextColor(15,23,42);
  doc.text(aeroVal, 40, 55);

  // Separador
  doc.setDrawColor(203,213,225); doc.setLineWidth(0.2); doc.line(14,57,196,57);

  // Tripulación — columnas: Piloto | Obs1 | Obs2
  var colW = tripLineas.length === 3 ? 60 : (tripLineas.length === 2 ? 91 : 182);
  var startTripY = 62;
  tripLineas.forEach(function(t, ti) {
    var tx = 16 + (ti * colW);
    doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(71,85,105);
    doc.text(t.rol, tx, startTripY);
    doc.setFont("helvetica","normal"); doc.setFontSize(7.5); doc.setTextColor(15,23,42);
    var nombreCortado = doc.splitTextToSize(t.val, colW - 4);
    doc.text(nombreCortado[0]||"", tx, startTripY + 4.5);
  });

  // Actualizar iniY para que la grilla arranque debajo del bloque
  var iniYOffset = 50 + altoBloque;

  var casillas=[
    {l:"Nro. de Registro:",v:datos.nroRegistro||"Sin numero"},
    {l:"Departamento:",v:datos.departamento||"-"},
    {l:"Fecha del Hecho:",v:datos.fecha},
    {l:"Hora del Registro:",v:datos.hora+" hs"},
    {l:"Direccion / Ubicacion:",v:datos.direccion||"No especificada"},
    {l:"Jurisdiccion Seccional:",v:datos.seccional},
    {l:"Zona de Patrullaje:",v:datos.zona},
    {l:"Hecho Constatado:",v:datos.hecho||"No corresponde"},
    {l:"Complemento:",v:datos.complemento||"Sin novedad"},
    {l:"Operativo Policial:",v:datos.operativo||"Sin operativo"},
    {l:"Nro SIVVE:",v:datos.sivve||"N/A"},
    {l:"ID Evento SGSP:",v:datos.sgsp||"N/A"},
    {l:"Unidad Solicitante:",v:datos.solicitante},
    {l:"Aeronave:",v:(datos.tipoAeronave&&datos.tipoAeronave!=="-"?datos.tipoAeronave:"N/A")+" | Mat: "+(datos.matricula||"N/A")}
  ];
  var iniY=iniYOffset, alto=7.5, ancho=91, fila=0;
  casillas.forEach(function(c,i){
    var impar=i%2!==0;
    var x=impar?14+ancho:14, y=iniY+(fila*alto);
    doc.setFillColor(248,250,252); doc.rect(x,y,35,alto,"F"); doc.rect(x,y,35,alto,"D");
    doc.setFillColor(255,255,255); doc.rect(x+35,y,ancho-35,alto,"F"); doc.rect(x+35,y,ancho-35,alto,"D");
    doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(7.5); doc.setTextColor(71,85,105);
    doc.text(c.l,x+2,y+4.8);
    doc.setFont("helvetica","normal"); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(15,23,42);
    var cortado=doc.splitTextToSize(String(c.v),ancho-39);
    doc.text(cortado[0]||"",x+37,y+4.8);
    if (impar) fila++;
  });
  // Calcular cuantas filas ocuparon las casillas (pares = ceil(n/2))
  var totalFilas = Math.ceil(casillas.length/2);
  var ny = iniY + (totalFilas * alto) + 4;
  doc.setFillColor(248,250,252); doc.rect(14,ny,182,7.5,"F"); doc.rect(14,ny,182,7.5,"D");
  doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(15,23,42);
  doc.text("NARRACION",18,ny+5);
  // Narración dinámica con paginación automática
  var lineaNarr = doc.splitTextToSize(datos.narracion, 174);
  var altLinea = 4.5; // mm por línea a fontSize 8.5
  var maxYPag = 278;  // margen inferior antes del pie de página
  var curY = ny + 14;
  var linesLeft = lineaNarr.slice();

  // Calcular cuántas líneas entran en esta primera página
  var lineasDisp = Math.floor((maxYPag - curY) / altLinea);
  var bloque1 = linesLeft.splice(0, lineasDisp);

  // Dibujar rect de narración en pág 1 — altura exacta al contenido o al espacio disponible
  var altoRect1 = Math.min(lineasDisp * altLinea + 8, maxYPag - (ny+7.5));
  doc.setFillColor(255,255,255); doc.rect(14,ny+7.5,182,altoRect1,"F"); doc.rect(14,ny+7.5,182,altoRect1,"D");
  doc.setFont("helvetica","normal"); doc.setFontSize(8.5); doc.setTextColor(30,41,59);
  doc.text(bloque1, 18, curY);

  // Páginas adicionales de narración si hay texto restante
  var paginaNarr = 2;
  while(linesLeft.length > 0) {
    doc.addPage();
    marcaAgua(doc);
    encabezado(doc, paginaNarr);
    paginaNarr++;

    // Encabezado de continuación
    doc.setFillColor(248,250,252); doc.rect(14,45,182,7.5,"F"); doc.rect(14,45,182,7.5,"D");
    doc.setFont("helvetica","bold"); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(15,23,42);
    doc.text("NARRACION (continuacion)",18,50);

    var startY = 58;
    var lineasPag = Math.floor((maxYPag - startY) / altLinea);
    var bloquePag = linesLeft.splice(0, lineasPag);
    var altoRectPag = bloquePag.length * altLinea + 8;
    doc.setFillColor(255,255,255); doc.rect(14,startY-2,182,altoRectPag,"F"); doc.rect(14,startY-2,182,altoRectPag,"D");
    doc.setFont("helvetica","normal"); doc.setFontSize(8.5); doc.setTextColor(30,41,59);
    doc.text(bloquePag, 18, startY);
  }
  // Actualizar numero de pagina para fotos
  np = paginaNarr;

  // Firma eliminada

  // FOTOS
  var fotos=datos.fotos; var pi=0;
  while(pi<fotos.length){
    doc.addPage(); marcaAgua(doc); encabezado(doc,np);
    var f1=fotos[pi];
    if(f1.orientacion==="Vertical"){
      doc.setFillColor(248,250,252); doc.rect(14,45,182,195,"F"); doc.rect(14,45,182,195,"D");
      try{doc.addImage(f1.base64,"JPEG",30,50,150,165);}catch(e){}
      if(wmImg!=="NINGUNA"){doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(10);doc.setFillColor(0,0,0);doc.rect(32,203,doc.getTextWidth(wmImg)+6,6,"F");doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.text(wmImg,35,207);}
      doc.setFillColor(15,23,42);doc.rect(14,218,182,22,"F");
      doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(8);
      doc.text("EVIDENCIA FOTOGRAFICA #"+(pi+1)+" (VERTICAL):",18,223.5);
      doc.setFont("helvetica","normal");doc.setFontSize(8.5);doc.setTextColor(226,232,240);
      doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(f1.pie||"Sin descripcion.",174),18,228);
      pi++;
    } else {
      doc.setFillColor(248,250,252);doc.rect(14,45,182,95,"F");doc.rect(14,45,182,95,"D");
      try{doc.addImage(f1.base64,"JPEG",25,49,160,68);}catch(e){}
      if(wmImg!=="NINGUNA"){doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setFillColor(0,0,0);doc.rect(27,108,doc.getTextWidth(wmImg)+4,5,"F");doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.text(wmImg,29,111.5);}
      doc.setFillColor(15,23,42);doc.rect(14,119,182,21,"F");
      doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(8.5);
      doc.text("EVIDENCIA FOTOGRAFICA #"+(pi+1)+" (HORIZONTAL):",18,124);
      doc.setFont("helvetica","normal");doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(226,232,240);
      doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(f1.pie||"Sin descripcion.",174),18,128.5);
      pi++;
      if(pi<fotos.length && fotos[pi].orientacion==="Horizontal"){
        var f2=fotos[pi];
        doc.setFillColor(248,250,252);doc.rect(14,145,182,95,"F");doc.rect(14,145,182,95,"D");
        try{doc.addImage(f2.base64,"JPEG",25,149,160,68);}catch(e){}
        if(wmImg!=="NINGUNA"){doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setFillColor(0,0,0);doc.rect(27,208,doc.getTextWidth(wmImg)+4,5,"F");doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.text(wmImg,29,211.5);}
        doc.setFillColor(15,23,42);doc.rect(14,219,182,21,"F");
        doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.setFont("helvetica","bold");doc.setFontSize(8.5);
        doc.text("EVIDENCIA FOTOGRAFICA #"+(pi+1)+" (HORIZONTAL):",18,224);
        doc.setFont("helvetica","normal");doc.setFontSize(8);doc.setTextColor(226,232,240);
        doc.text(doc.splitTextToSize(f2.pie||"Sin descripcion.",174),18,228.5);
        pi++;
      }
    }
    np++;
  }

  var nombre=datos.id.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/g,"_");
  doc.save("Reporte_"+nombre+".pdf");
  mostrarAlerta("success","PDF Generado","Descargado: Reporte_"+nombre+".pdf");
}

function mostrarAlerta(tipo,titulo,msg){
  var ic=document.getElementById("alert-icon-container");
  var i=document.getElementById("alert-icon");
  document.getElementById("alert-title").innerText=titulo;
  document.getElementById("alert-message").innerText=msg;
  if(tipo==="success"){ic.className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-green-400 bg-green-950/40 border border-green-800";i.setAttribute("data-lucide","check-circle");}
  else if(tipo==="alert"){ic.className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-amber-400 bg-amber-950/40 border border-amber-800";i.setAttribute("data-lucide","alert-triangle");}
  else{ic.className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto text-blue-400 bg-blue-950/40 border border-blue-800";i.setAttribute("data-lucide","info");}
  document.getElementById("modal-alert").classList.remove("hidden");
  lucide.createIcons();
}
function cerrarAlert(){document.getElementById("modal-alert").classList.add("hidden");}
function abrirModalAcercaDe(){document.getElementById("modal-acerca").classList.remove("hidden");}
function cerrarModalAcercaDe(){document.getElementById("modal-acerca").classList.add("hidden");}
</script>
</body>
</html># Informe Primario

Sistema para generación automática de informes con imágenes y PDF.
